name: Sausage, Green Peppers and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut sausage into 5-inch sections.
2. In a large pot, boil sausage for approximately 30 minutes.
3. In a skillet, melt butter over medium-low heat. Add green peppers and onions. Cover and stir occasionally until the peppers and onions are tender.
4. Remove vegetables from the skillet and add the sausage links. Fry on medium heat until brown. Turn off the heat.
5. Serve on hot dog buns with mustard.
Serves 8
